TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: 億David A. Granger ryax sa tay 15 nqu tay 7, David A. Granger, squliq na sezi'. (minhtuw sa kawas tay 1945) mrhuw Guyana ta' misuw hya' ga David A. Granger, aring ryax tay 16 squ byacing tay 5 sa kawas 2015 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. Granger David Arthur htgan beh Georgetown. 1965 kawas,tmwang Guyana hetay. pincyogan nya Granger mqwas beh Guyana's pqwasan biru, Forbes Burnham,Cheddi Jagan,Samuel Hinds ru Walter Rodney ru Rupert Roopnaraine msqun mqwas biru. mshriq Queen's krahu' pqwasan biru lga,hiya ga hetay na linhoyan maki Queen's pqwasan biru. 1965 kawas,Granger thoki na sllwa na mqbaq tmwang Guyana hetay na kofan ru 1966 kawas pbqan sa mrhuw na hetay.hiya ga pqwasan na paras rhyal na hetay magal spyang na pqbaq na kunring zyuwaw na hetay maki Nigeria. Brazil 叢林戰 pcbaq na linhoyan ru pqwasan biru na phkangi ru thoki na Mons pqwasan biru. 1979 kawas,Granger ga hetay na kofan 司令 maki Guyana.1990 kawas,hiya ga mrhuw na koka 安全顧問,suruw lga,maki 1992 kawas mhngaw la. 1992 kawas,psrux sa Kweyana pspkal sinbung na kkta biru ru mtzyaw nqu pbiru.psmsun zyuwaw nqu hetay,zyuwaw nqu kinbkisan ru llamu Meti sbiru nya. koka nqu Kweyana kneril nqu paring pqtaq mqbaq na pbiru maki ego Caribbean . qnxan nya Granger Sandra ru Granger kokong la.maki sazing kneril laqi,Han,Afuwa lalu nya.2018 kawas 12 byacing ,Granger pinspung nqu sinsi phgup ma kya qu innbu nya ga Kang nqu Hwocicinlinpa . cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru'
S.PHON: **a*i* a. ɣraŋer rjax s~ɕa taj ** nqu taj *, *a*i* a. ɣraŋer, s~ɕquliq na s~ɕeziʔ. (minħtuw s~ɕa kawas~ɕ taj ****) mrħuw ɣujana taʔ mis~ɕuw ħjaʔ ɣa *a*i* a. ɣraŋer, ariŋ rjax taj ** s~ɕqu βjaʦ~ʨiŋ taj * s~ɕa kawas~ɕ **** lɣa, mus~ɕaʔ s~ɕpazjaŋ βalaj ms~ɕʔrux kja la. ɣraŋer *a*i* artħur ħtɣan βeħ ɣeorɣetown. **** kawas~ɕ,tmwaŋ ɣujana ħetaj. pinʦ~ʨjoɣan nja ɣraŋer mqwas~ɕ βeħ ɣujanaʔs~ɕ pqwas~ɕan βiru, *orβes~ɕ βurnħam,ʦ~ʨħe**i *aɣan,s~ɕamuel ħin*s~ɕ ru walter ro*nej ru rupert roopnaraine ms~ɕqun mqwas~ɕ βiru. ms~ɕħriq queenʔs~ɕ kraħuʔ pqwas~ɕan βiru lɣa,ħija ɣa ħetaj na linħojan maki queenʔs~ɕ pqwas~ɕan βiru. **** kawas~ɕ,ɣraŋer tħoki na s~ɕllwa na mqβaq tmwaŋ ɣujana ħetaj na ko*an ru **** kawas~ɕ pβqan s~ɕa mrħuw na ħetaj.ħija ɣa pqwas~ɕan na paras~ɕ rħjal na ħetaj maɣal s~ɕpjaŋ na pqβaq na kunriŋ zjuwaw na ħetaj maki niɣeria. βrazil *** pʦ~ʨβaq na linħojan ru pqwas~ɕan βiru na pħkaŋi ru tħoki na mons~ɕ pqwas~ɕan βiru. **** kawas~ɕ,ɣraŋer ɣa ħetaj na ko*an ** maki ɣujana.**** kawas~ɕ,ħija ɣa mrħuw na koka ****,s~ɕuruw lɣa,maki **** kawas~ɕ mħŋaw la. **** kawas~ɕ,ps~ɕrux s~ɕa kwejana ps~ɕpkal s~ɕinβuŋ na kkta βiru ru mtzjaw nqu pβiru.ps~ɕms~ɕun zjuwaw nqu ħetaj,zjuwaw nqu kinβkis~ɕan ru llamu meti s~ɕβiru nja. koka nqu kwejana kneril nqu pariŋ pqtaq mqβaq na pβiru maki eɣo ʦ~ʨariββean . qnxan nja ɣraŋer s~ɕan*ra ru ɣraŋer kokoŋ la.maki s~ɕaziŋ kneril laqi,ħan,a*uwa lalu nja.**** kawas~ɕ ** βjaʦ~ʨiŋ ,ɣraŋer pins~ɕpuŋ nqu s~ɕins~ɕi pħɣup ma kja qu innβu nja ɣa kaŋ nqu ħwoʦ~ʨiʦ~ʨinlinpa . ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ
S.FORM: 億David A. Granger ryax sa tay 15 nqu tay 7, David A. Granger, squliq na sezi'. (minhtuw sa kawas tay 1945) mrhuw Guyana ta' misuw hya' ga David A. Granger, aring ryax tay 16 squ byacing tay 5 sa kawas 2015 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. Granger David Arthur htgan beh Georgetown. 1965 kawas,tmwang Guyana hetay. pincyogan nya Granger mqwas beh Guyana's pqwasan biru, Forbes Burnham,Cheddi Jagan,Samuel Hinds ru Walter Rodney ru Rupert Roopnaraine msqun mqwas biru. mshriq Queen's krahu' pqwasan biru lga,hiya ga hetay na linhoyan maki Queen's pqwasan biru. 1965 kawas,Granger thoki na sllwa na mqbaq tmwang Guyana hetay na kofan ru 1966 kawas pbqan sa mrhuw na hetay.hiya ga pqwasan na paras rhyal na hetay magal spyang na pqbaq na kunring zyuwaw na hetay maki Nigeria. Brazil 叢林戰 pcbaq na linhoyan ru pqwasan biru na phkangi ru thoki na Mons pqwasan biru. 1979 kawas,Granger ga hetay na kofan 司令 maki Guyana.1990 kawas,hiya ga mrhuw na koka 安全顧問,suruw lga,maki 1992 kawas mhngaw la. 1992 kawas,psrux sa Kweyana pspkal sinbung na kkta biru ru mtzyaw nqu pbiru.psmsun zyuwaw nqu hetay,zyuwaw nqu kinbkisan ru llamu Meti sbiru nya. koka nqu Kweyana kneril nqu paring pqtaq mqbaq na pbiru maki ego Caribbean . qnxan nya Granger Sandra ru Granger kokong la.maki sazing kneril laqi,Han,Afuwa lalu nya.2018 kawas 12 byacing ,Granger pinspung nqu sinsi phgup ma kya qu innbu nya ga Kang nqu Hwocicinlinpa . cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru'
S.PHON: **a*i* a. ɣraŋer rjax s~ɕa taj ** nqu taj *, *a*i* a. ɣraŋer, s~ɕquliq na s~ɕeziʔ. (minħtuw s~ɕa kawas~ɕ taj ****) mrħuw ɣujana taʔ mis~ɕuw ħjaʔ ɣa *a*i* a. ɣraŋer, ariŋ rjax taj ** s~ɕqu βjaʦ~ʨiŋ taj * s~ɕa kawas~ɕ **** lɣa, mus~ɕaʔ s~ɕpazjaŋ βalaj ms~ɕʔrux kja la. ɣraŋer *a*i* artħur ħtɣan βeħ ɣeorɣetown. **** kawas~ɕ,tmwaŋ ɣujana ħetaj. pinʦ~ʨjoɣan nja ɣraŋer mqwas~ɕ βeħ ɣujanaʔs~ɕ pqwas~ɕan βiru, *orβes~ɕ βurnħam,ʦ~ʨħe**i *aɣan,s~ɕamuel ħin*s~ɕ ru walter ro*nej ru rupert roopnaraine ms~ɕqun mqwas~ɕ βiru. ms~ɕħriq queenʔs~ɕ kraħuʔ pqwas~ɕan βiru lɣa,ħija ɣa ħetaj na linħojan maki queenʔs~ɕ pqwas~ɕan βiru. **** kawas~ɕ,ɣraŋer tħoki na s~ɕllwa na mqβaq tmwaŋ ɣujana ħetaj na ko*an ru **** kawas~ɕ pβqan s~ɕa mrħuw na ħetaj.ħija ɣa pqwas~ɕan na paras~ɕ rħjal na ħetaj maɣal s~ɕpjaŋ na pqβaq na kunriŋ zjuwaw na ħetaj maki niɣeria. βrazil *** pʦ~ʨβaq na linħojan ru pqwas~ɕan βiru na pħkaŋi ru tħoki na mons~ɕ pqwas~ɕan βiru. **** kawas~ɕ,ɣraŋer ɣa ħetaj na ko*an ** maki ɣujana.**** kawas~ɕ,ħija ɣa mrħuw na koka ****,s~ɕuruw lɣa,maki **** kawas~ɕ mħŋaw la. **** kawas~ɕ,ps~ɕrux s~ɕa kwejana ps~ɕpkal s~ɕinβuŋ na kkta βiru ru mtzjaw nqu pβiru.ps~ɕms~ɕun zjuwaw nqu ħetaj,zjuwaw nqu kinβkis~ɕan ru llamu meti s~ɕβiru nja. koka nqu kwejana kneril nqu pariŋ pqtaq mqβaq na pβiru maki eɣo ʦ~ʨariββean . qnxan nja ɣraŋer s~ɕan*ra ru ɣraŋer kokoŋ la.maki s~ɕaziŋ kneril laqi,ħan,a*uwa lalu nja.**** kawas~ɕ ** βjaʦ~ʨiŋ ,ɣraŋer pins~ɕpuŋ nqu s~ɕins~ɕi pħɣup ma kja qu innβu nja ɣa kaŋ nqu ħwoʦ~ʨiʦ~ʨinlinpa . ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ
